title: SWORD Health - Digital Physical Therapy
problem: Physical therapy access is limited and costly for musculoskeletal patients, creating barriers to recovery.
solution: Digital physical therapy platform with FDA-listed wearable device and AI-powered exercise guidance with remote PT oversight.
technology: Wearable motion tracking device, AI coaching, remote physical therapist dashboard
ai_type: AI for exercise guidance and form correction
regulatory_notes: FDA listed Class II medical device
varden_fit: HIGH - Digital PT pathway. Model for orthopedic referral-to-digital-treatment. Strong EU presence.
notes: Strong digital PT solution. FDA-listed device differentiates from competitors. Good EU base.
